name: cde-redundancy
title: Redundancy & Duplicate Data
description: CDE-authored — duplicate assets by source, reclaimable TB by sensitivity & reclaimable TB by source over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: DupsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate) AS dups FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ReclaimBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sensitivity AS sens, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE is_duplicate GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SavingsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC
